# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

QECirc is a continuously deployed website. Security updates are applied to the
current `main` branch and the live site at https://qecirc.com. There is no
versioned release line.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a potential security issue, please use GitHub's private vulnerability
reporting feature:

https://github.com/qecirc/qecirc-website/security/advisories/new

Please do **not** open a public issue about a potential security vulnerability.

You can find more details on private vulnerability reporting in the GitHub
documentation:

https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability
